implementation_checklist: Enforce strict provenance and taint controls
Trace each integrated requirement to a verification signal

traceability_matrix.statement: Efficiency objective for Bookkeeping: Users must be able to generate financial reports with a focus on performance and sustainability metrics
The system shall ensure efficiency (resource utilization): Users must be able to generate financial reports such as balance sheets, income statements, and cash flow statements
The system shall ensure responsibility (regulatory accountability): The system must support multiple accounts and categories
The system shall ensure safety (hazard prevention): Users must be able to generate financial reports such as balance sheets, income statements, and cash flow statements
The system shall ensure sustainability (resource lifecycle control): Users must be able to generate financial reports such as balance sheets, income statements, and cash flow st...
The system shall ensure trustworthiness (auditability): The system must ensure double-entry bookkeeping principles are followed and maintain an audit trail of all transactions
The system shall ensure efficiency (throughput stability): The system must support multiple accounts and categories
